app.name: CloudSaw
app.tagline: 本地优先的 AWS 安全扫描器
report_bug.modal_body: Pick where to send your report. Public bugs go to the GitHub issue tracker; suspected vulnerabilities go straight to the security inbox so they can be triaged privately.
report_bug.email_hint: The email link opens your default mail client. For sensitive vulnerability reports prefer this channel over the public issue tracker.
report_bug.open_failed: Could not open the link: {detail}. Copy the URL manually if needed.
settings.appearance.title: Theme
settings.appearance.subtitle: Pick a light, dark, or system-matched look for CloudSaw. Changes apply immediately.
settings.appearance.light.label: Light
settings.appearance.light.description: Bright surfaces — best in well-lit rooms.
settings.appearance.dark.label: Dark
settings.appearance.dark.description: Warm beige text on dark backgrounds — easier on the eyes in low light.
settings.appearance.system.label: Match system
settings.appearance.system.description: Follow your operating system's light / dark setting automatically.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.subtitle: Choose whether CloudSaw posts a system notification when a scan finishes.
settings.notifications.scan_complete_des: When enabled, a desktop notification appears each time a scan reaches a terminal state. First use prompts for OS permission.
notifications.scan_complete.title: CloudSaw scan complete
dashboard.welcome.title: Dashboard
findings.page.title: Findings
findings.page.subtitle: Security findings from your most recent scans.
findings.filter.search_placeholder: Search by name, rule, or description…
findings.empty.no_accounts.title: No accounts configured
findings.empty.no_accounts.body: Add an account in Settings → Accounts to start scanning.
findings.empty.no_findings.title: No findings match your filters
findings.empty.no_findings.body: Try clearing the search query or relaxing the severity / service / status filters.
findings.empty.run_scan.title: No findings yet
findings.empty.run_scan.body: Run a scan to start surfacing findings. The scan modal will route you to the right Settings panel if anything (account, scanner role, AWS profile) is missing.
dashboard.welcome.scan_subtitle: Run a scan to see the latest security findings for your AWS accounts.
dashboard.welcome.no_accounts.title: No accounts configured
dashboard.welcome.no_accounts.body: Add an AWS account in Settings → Accounts to start scanning.
dashboard.recent_activity.title: Recent activity
dashboard.recent_activity.empty: No scans yet — click Scan now to get started.
dashboard.top_findings.title: Top findings
dashboard.top_findings.empty: No findings in the latest scan.
empty.no_scans.title: No scans yet
empty.no_scans.body: Connect an AWS account from the Accounts tab to run your first scan.
home.heading: 欢迎使用 CloudSaw
home.body: Scan AWS accounts for misconfigurations — fully local, no data leaves your machine.
applock.disclosure: 应用锁仅防止他人随意打开应用。它不会加密磁盘上的数据 — 请使用全盘加密(FileVault、BitLocker、LUKS)以防设备被盗。
applock.setup.title: 设置主密码
applock.setup.subtitle: 在使用 CloudSaw 之前,请设置一个用于锁定窗口的密码。
applock.unlock.title: CloudSaw 已锁定
applock.unlock.subtitle: 请输入主密码以继续。
applock.biometric.busy: 正在等待生物识别验证…
applock.recovery.title: 重置密码
applock.recovery.reason: 验证身份以重置 CloudSaw 的主密码
applock.recovery.explainer: 操作系统将要求您确认身份(设备 PIN、密码或通行密钥)。验证成功后您可设置新的主密码 — 旧密码不会被泄露。
applock.recovery.unavailable_hint: 此设备不支持恢复。您必须记住密码或重新安装 CloudSaw。
applock.settings.subtitle: 管理 CloudSaw 何时锁定以及再次询问密码。
applock.settings.period.label: 重新锁定时间
applock.settings.period.never_warning: CloudSaw 不会再询问密码。使用「立即锁定」或设置重新锁定时间以恢复保护。
applock.settings.biometric.label: 允许生物识别解锁
applock.settings.biometric.description: 使用 Windows Hello、Touch ID 或您设备的身份验证提示来解锁 CloudSaw。密码解锁仍可作为备用方式。
applock.settings.biometric.unavailable: 此设备未向 CloudSaw 提供生物识别提示。
applock.settings.biometric.unconfigured: 生物识别硬件存在但当前未在系统中配置。
applock.error.rate_limited: 尝试次数过多。请在 {seconds} 秒后重试。
applock.error.identity_unavailable: 此设备不支持身份验证。
profiles.title: AWS 配置文件
profiles.subtitle: 从 ~/.aws/config 发现的配置文件。CloudSaw 不会直接读取 ~/.aws/credentials — 凭证由 AWS SDK 在扫描时解析。
profiles.empty.title: 未找到 AWS 配置文件
profiles.empty.body: 请在终端运行 `aws configure` 或 `aws configure sso`，然后点击「刷新配置文件」。
accounts.title: 账户
accounts.subtitle: 你为 CloudSaw 配置的 AWS 账户。活动账户是新扫描和报告的目标。
accounts.section.configured_hint: 每个账户将一个标签绑定到一个 AWS 配置文件。保存前会通过 sts:GetCallerIdentity 验证 AWS 账户 ID。
accounts.reveal_toggle.label: 显示完整的账户 ID
accounts.empty.title: 尚未配置账户
accounts.empty.body: 添加一个账户，让 CloudSaw 指向某个 AWS 配置文件。CloudSaw 会验证该配置并保存 AWS 账户 ID — 绝不保存凭证。
accounts.row.profile_missing_hint: 配置文件「{profile}」已不在 ~/.aws/config 中。请用 `aws configure` 重新创建（或将此账户指向其他配置文件）。
accounts.add.title: 添加 AWS 账户
accounts.add.explainer: CloudSaw 会对所选配置文件调用 sts:GetCallerIdentity 来验证账户 ID。不会保存任何凭证。
accounts.add.label_hint: 该账户在 CloudSaw 中显示的名称（例如「acme-dev」）。必须唯一。
accounts.add.profile_hint: CloudSaw 用来解析凭证的配置文件。请从 ~/.aws/config 中选择一个。
accounts.add.no_profiles: ~/.aws/config 中没有配置文件。请运行 `aws configure` 或 `aws configure sso` 然后重新打开此对话框。
accounts.edit.title: 编辑账户
accounts.edit.explainer: 更换配置文件会重新验证账户 ID。如果新配置文件解析到不同的账户，更改会被拒绝 — 请删除此账户并新增。
accounts.edit.profile_hint: 只有当你在 ~/.aws/config 中用其他名字重新配置了同一账户时，才需要更换配置文件。
accounts.remove.title: 删除账户
accounts.remove.explainer: 这将永久删除「{label}」在 CloudSaw 中的记录。下方数据会从你的设备删除。AWS 账户本身不受影响。
accounts.remove.permanence: 删除是立即且永久的 — 无法撤销。
accounts.error.duplicate_aws_account_id: 已有其他 CloudSaw 账户在使用此 AWS 账户 ID。
accounts.error.duplicate_label: 该标签已被另一账户占用。
accounts.error.aws_account_id_mismatch: 所选配置文件解析到不同的 AWS 账户。请删除此账户并改为添加新配置文件。
accounts.cli_profiles.title: AWS CLI Profiles
accounts.cli_profiles.subtitle: AWS profiles configured on this machine (read from ~/.aws/config). Test verifies a profile can reach AWS via sts:GetCallerIdentity.
accounts.cli_profiles.empty: No AWS profiles configured on this machine yet.
accounts.cli_profiles.add_modal.title: Add AWS CLI profile
accounts.cli_profiles.add_modal.subtitle: Saved to ~/.aws/credentials (key material) and ~/.aws/config (region + output). CloudSaw does not transmit these values.
accounts.cli_profiles.add_modal.name: Profile name
accounts.cli_profiles.add_modal.name_hin: Letters, digits, dot, underscore, hyphen. 1–128 chars.
accounts.cli_profiles.add_error_name_inv: Profile name must be 1–128 characters of letters, digits, dot, underscore, or hyphen.
accounts.cli_profiles.add_error_duplicat: A profile named "{name}" already exists in ~/.aws/config.
accounts.cli_profiles.add_error_write_fa: Could not write to ~/.aws/. Check the directory permissions and try again.
accounts.cli_profiles.add_error_secret_i: Access key ID and secret access key are required.
aws.error.config_unreadable: 无法读取你的 AWS 配置文件。
aws.error.timeout: AWS 未在规定时间内响应。请检查网络后重试。
aws.error.connectivity: 无法连接到 AWS。请检查网络。
aws.error.sso_expired: SSO 会话已过期。请运行 `aws sso login` 后重试。
aws.error.permission_denied: AWS 拒绝了请求。该配置文件无此 API 权限。
aws.failure.sso_expired: SSO 会话已过期。请运行 `aws sso login`。
aws.failure.permission_denied: 此 API 权限被拒绝。
aws.failure.connectivity: 网络或 AWS 端点不可达。
aws.failure.timeout: AWS 在 10 秒内未响应。
aws.failure.other: 无法使用该配置文件进行认证。
terraform.provision.title: Provision scanner role
terraform.provision.subtitle: CloudSaw will create a least-privilege IAM role ({role_name}) in this account using the bundled Terraform binary. No credentials leave your machine.
terraform.provision.detect.missing.title: Terraform binary not bundled
terraform.provision.detect.missing.body: This CloudSaw build does not include a Terraform binary for your platform. Install a release build to provision scanner roles.
terraform.provision.detect.integrity.bod: The bundled Terraform binary's SHA-256 does not match the build-pinned hash. CloudSaw refuses to run a tampered binary. Reinstall a fresh CloudSaw build.
terraform.provision.policy.title: Permissions
terraform.provision.policy.security_audi: Read-only access focused on security-relevant resources. The least-privilege default.
terraform.provision.policy.read_only_acc: Broader read access across all AWS services. Choose only if SecurityAudit misses resources you need to scan.
terraform.provision.policy.warning: ReadOnlyAccess grants broader read permissions than SecurityAudit. Use only if SecurityAudit isn't sufficient.
terraform.provision.plan.title: Plan diff
terraform.provision.plan.no_changes: No changes. The scanner role already matches the desired state — applying is a safe no-op.
terraform.provision.plan.principal_hint: The trust policy will allow only this ARN to assume the scanner role. CloudSaw resolved this from sts:GetCallerIdentity.
terraform.provision.apply.success.title: Scanner role provisioned
terraform.provision.apply.success.body: Role {role_name} created. CloudSaw can now scan this account.
terraform.error.not_bundled: This CloudSaw build doesn't include a Terraform binary for your platform.
terraform.error.integrity_failed: The bundled Terraform binary failed its integrity check. Reinstall CloudSaw from a trusted source.
terraform.error.init_failed: terraform init failed. Check that you can reach the AWS provider registry from this machine.
terraform.error.plan_failed: terraform plan failed. The AWS credentials may lack the IAM permissions needed to read role state.
terraform.error.apply_failed: Provisioning the scanner role failed. The most likely cause is that the AWS profile you chose doesn't have permission to create an IAM role and attach a policy on this account. Confirm the profile has the required IAM permissions, then re-plan and apply.
terraform.error.plan_token_invalid: That plan has been discarded. Generate a new plan and try again.
terraform.error.plan_token_expired: A newer plan exists for this account. Generate a fresh plan and apply that one instead.
terraform.error.identity_unresolvable: CloudSaw couldn't resolve the AWS caller identity to a trust-policy principal. The session may be of an unsupported type.
terraform.error.trust_verification_faile: The role's trust policy doesn't match what CloudSaw planned. Apply was halted and the role's state should be inspected.
scanner.scan.title: Run security scan
scanner.picker.subtitle: Pick an account to scan.
scanner.picker.empty_body: Add an account in Accounts before running a scan.
scanner.scan.subtitle: CloudSaw will assume the provisioned scanner role for "{label}" and run the bundled ScoutSuite binary locally. Findings stay on your machine.
scanner.scan.failure_hint: CloudSaw saved the scanner's raw output and error log. Open the scan folder to inspect them or share with support.
scanner.scan.handoff: Findings are ready to be parsed (handled by the next module).
scanner.detect.missing.title: ScoutSuite binary not bundled
scanner.detect.missing.body: This CloudSaw build does not include a ScoutSuite binary for your platform. Install a release build to run scans.
scanner.detect.integrity.title: ScoutSuite integrity check failed
scanner.detect.integrity.body: The bundled ScoutSuite binary's SHA-256 does not match the build-pinned hash. CloudSaw refuses to run a tampered binary. Reinstall a fresh CloudSaw build.
scanner.warning.missing_permissions: The scanner role lacked some permissions the scan needs. Partial results are available.
scanner.failure.scanner_not_bundled: This CloudSaw build doesn't include a ScoutSuite binary for your platform.
scanner.failure.scanner_integrity_failed: The bundled ScoutSuite binary failed its integrity check.
scanner.failure.scanner_role_not_provisi: 配置扫描角色 for this account before running a scan.
scanner.failure.scan_already_running: Another scan is already running for this account.
scanner.failure.scan_not_found: That scan record is no longer in CloudSaw.
scanner.failure.scanner_assume_role_fail: CloudSaw couldn't assume the scanner role. The session may have expired or the role's trust policy may have changed.
scanner.failure.scanner_spawn_failed: Couldn't launch the ScoutSuite binary. Reinstall CloudSaw if the problem persists.
scanner.failure.scanner_process_lost: The scanner process disappeared (the machine may have slept). Run the scan again.
scanner.failure.scanner_process_failed: The scanner exited with an error. Check the role's permissions and try again.
scanner.failure.scanner_output_missing: The scanner finished but produced no findings file.
dashboard.title: 发现
dashboard.subtitle: 活动 AWS 账户的扫描、发现、漂移和趋势。
dashboard.no_active_account.title: No active account
dashboard.no_active_account.body: Select an active account from the Accounts page to see scans, findings, drift, and trends.
dashboard.scans.title: Scan history
dashboard.scans.subtitle: Past scans for {account}. Most recent first.
dashboard.scans.empty.title: No scans yet
dashboard.scans.empty.body: Run a scan from the Accounts page to see history here.
dashboard.findings.title: Findings — scan {scan}
dashboard.findings.column.title: Finding
dashboard.findings.empty.title: No findings to show
dashboard.findings.empty.body: Either this scan reported zero findings, or your scanner role lacks the permissions to see them. A clean scan and a permission-limited scan can look identical — review the scanner role's policy if you expected to see findings here.
dashboard.findings.empty.filtered.title: No findings match these filters
dashboard.findings.empty.filtered.body: Adjust the severity, service, or status filters above to see more findings.
dashboard.findings.detail.heading: Finding detail
dashboard.findings.detail.no_selection: Select a finding to view its remediation guidance and compliance mappings.
dashboard.findings.detail.no_article.bod: CloudSaw doesn't ship a knowledge-base article for this finding type yet. The raw finding data is shown above so you can still triage it.
dashboard.findings.detail.resources.empt: No resources recorded for this finding.
dashboard.findings.detail.mappings.title: Compliance mappings
dashboard.findings.detail.mappings.empty: This finding isn't mapped to any compliance framework in CloudSaw's bundled dataset.
dashboard.findings.detail.error: Couldn't load this finding. Error code: {code}
dashboard.severity.label: 严重性
dashboard.drift.title: Drift
dashboard.drift.subtitle: Compare two scans for {account} to see new, resolved, and unchanged findings.
dashboard.drift.chart.title: Finding count over time
dashboard.drift.empty.title: Drift needs at least two scans
dashboard.drift.empty.body: Run a second scan to compare it against this one. Drift highlights what changed between scans.
dashboard.drift.same_scan: Pick two different scans to see drift.
dashboard.trends.title: Trends
dashboard.trends.subtitle: Remediation timelines and severity counts over time for {account}.
dashboard.trends.mttr.title: Mean time to remediation
dashboard.trends.mttr.subtitle: Average time between a finding first being seen and being resolved, per severity.
dashboard.trends.timeline.title: Per-finding remediation timeline
dashboard.trends.timeline.subtitle: The most recent findings, showing how long each was open before being resolved (or how long it's been open so far).
dashboard.trends.empty.title: Not enough data yet
dashboard.trends.empty.body: Trend views light up once a couple of scans have run for this account.
dashboard.error.load_failed: Couldn't load this view. Error code: {code}
schedules.section_subtitle: 按计划自动执行扫描。CloudSaw 使用与手动扫描相同的安全路径——新建 AssumeRole、校验后的二进制文件、不缓存凭证。
schedules.title: 定时扫描
schedules.subtitle: 按账户配置扫描周期。禁用某项不会清除配置,但后台运行器不会触发该扫描。
schedules.pick_an_account: 选择一个账户来配置其计划。
schedules.no_accounts.title: 尚未配置账户
schedules.no_accounts.body: 先添加 AWS 账户,然后再配置定时扫描。
schedules.empty: No scheduled scans yet. Click "Add schedule" to create one.
schedules.modal.pick_all_taken: All configured accounts already have a schedule.
schedules.field.enabled_hint: Disable to keep the configuration without firing scans.
schedules.panel.subtitle: The background runner checks this schedule every 30 seconds while the app is running. Missed runs (machine asleep or app closed) collapse into a single catch-up scan on next launch.
schedules.panel.role_warning: The scanner role isn't provisioned for this account yet. The schedule will be saved, but scheduled runs will be skipped until you provision the role.
schedule_not_found: No schedule is configured for that account.
eventlog.section_subtitle: Append-only record of what CloudSaw has done locally. Entries never include credentials, tokens, or secret values.
eventlog.title: 活动日志
eventlog.subtitle: Searchable record of recent activity. "Clear all" only clears the view — underlying rows persist subject to the event-log retention policy and still appear in Export.
eventlog.empty.title: No activity yet
eventlog.empty.body: Scan completions, account changes, password changes, deletions, exports, and retention events will appear here.
eventlog.empty.cleared_title: 活动日志 view is cleared
eventlog.empty.cleared_body: Underlying entries within the retention window still exist. Export to see the full log.
eventlog.export.modal_body: Pick a format and an optional date range / activity-type filter. The exported file is themed to match CloudSaw and is fully self-contained — no remote references.
eventlog.export.kind_hint: Leave all unchecked to export every activity kind.
eventlog.error.confirmation_rejected: 确认ation didn't match. Type the value exactly as shown.
eventlog.error.generic: Something went wrong with the activity log.
eventlog.export.toast: 活动日志 copied to your clipboard. Paste it into a file to save.
retention.section_subtitle: How long CloudSaw keeps raw scan output and the activity log. Findings metadata is kept indefinitely so trend and drift views remain accurate.
retention.scan.label: Raw scan output
retention.scan.hint: Older raw-scout.json files are removed from disk. Findings metadata is never touched.
retention.eventlog.label: 活动日志 entries
retention.eventlog.hint: Older activity log rows are removed. Independent of the raw-scan policy above.
retention.never_storage_hint: "Never" keeps the data forever. Storage will grow over time.
retention.toast: Purged {scans} scan dir(s), {raw} raw file(s), {events} event-log entr(ies).
delete.scan.title: Hard-delete this scan
delete.scan.explainer: This permanently removes scan {scan} for {account}: SQLite rows, the raw scan file, and the per-scan directory. After delete, VACUUM runs so removed rows are not trivially recoverable. This cannot be undone.
delete.scan.warning: Hard delete is immediate and permanent. There is no soft-delete and no grace period.
delete.scan.confirm_label: Type DELETE or the scan ID to confirm
delete.scan.secure_overwrite_hint: Best-effort. SSD wear-leveling can leave original data in spare pages — this is not a guarantee.
delete.scan.success: Scan deleted. {findings} finding(s) removed, VACUUM run.
reset.section_subtitle: Delete every CloudSaw account, profile, report, notification setting, theme preference, and log entry on this machine. The application itself stays installed and restarts automatically — you will land on the onboarding wizard.
reset.section_warning: Don't close the window. The reset takes a couple of minutes.
reset.modal.title: Reset CloudSaw application
reset.modal.explainer: Every CloudSaw account, profile, report, notification preference, theme, and log entry is removed. The app binary stays installed and restarts when the reset completes; the onboarding wizard runs as if this were a fresh install. There is no undo.
reset.modal.warning: Type RESET to confirm. Anything else cancels.
reset.modal.busy_body: CloudSaw is wiping local data and will restart automatically. Don't close this window — it takes a couple of minutes.
panic.section_subtitle: Remove every CloudSaw trace from this machine: database, scan output, Terraform state, logs, the event log, settings, and every CloudSaw keychain entry. The data wipe is immediate and synchronous. The app/installer is removed by a small helper on the next boot/login.
panic.title: Wipe every CloudSaw trace on this machine
panic.explainer: This removes EVERY local CloudSaw file and keychain entry. The data wipe is immediate and synchronous. There is no undo, no soft-delete, and no grace period — once started, you cannot cancel the wipe, only choose when to reboot afterward.
panic.warning: Type PANIC to confirm. Anything else cancels.
panic.success.title: CloudSaw data removed
panic.success.body: Removed {scans} scan dir(s), {tf} Terraform workdir(s), {logs} log file(s), {dbs} database file(s), and {keychain} keychain entr(ies). The app/installer self-delete helper {staged}.
panic.success.staged_yes: is staged to run on the next boot
panic.success.staged_no: couldn't be staged — you may need to remove app files manually
github.section_subtitle: 提交 bug 报告s against the CloudSaw repo and create tickets for findings on a repo of your choice. CloudSaw uses a single fine-grained personal access token, stored only in your OS keychain.
github.token.label: GitHub personal access token
github.token.hint: Fine-grained token scoped to "Issues: write" on the CloudSaw repo and the repos you want to file findings tickets on. The token is stored only in your OS keychain — never in SQLite, config files, logs, or URLs.
github.token.not_configured: No token configured — browser fallback is used for all submissions.
github.token.generate_cta: 在 GitHub 上生成令牌
github.findings_repo.label: Findings-ticket destination repo
github.findings_repo.hint: Repo where per-finding tickets are filed. The error-report destination is separate (the CloudSaw repo).
github.findings_repo.none: No repo selected. You'll be prompted to choose one when you create a finding ticket.
github.error_repo.label: Error-report destination
github.error_repo.hint: Bug reports are filed on this repo (hard-coded).
github.security_contact.label: Security contact
github.security_contact.hint: For issues that may involve sensitive AWS data, email this address with a PGP-encrypted report instead of filing a public issue.
github.error.no_token: No GitHub token is configured. Add one in 设置 → GitHub, or use the browser fallback.
github.error.token_invalid: GitHub rejected the configured token. 打开 设置 → GitHub and replace it with a fresh fine-grained PAT.
github.error.rate_limited: GitHub is rate-limiting requests right now. Try again in a few minutes, or use the browser fallback.
github.error.network: Couldn't reach GitHub. Check your network and try again.
github.error.server: GitHub returned an unexpected error. Try again, or use the browser fallback.
github.error.no_findings_repo: Pick a findings-ticket destination repo in 设置 → GitHub before creating a ticket.
github.error.duplicate_ticket: This finding already has a linked ticket.
errordialog.title: Something went wrong
errordialog.subtitle: Help us fix this by filing a bug report. CloudSaw redacts your data first — account IDs are masked, ARNs are truncated, and credentials/tokens are removed.
errordialog.notes_placeholder: e.g. "Clicked Scan on the prod account, the progress bar froze."
errordialog.save_bundle: 将诊断包复制到剪贴板
errordialog.save_bundle_done: Bundle copied — paste into a file to save.
errordialog.security_note: Issues that may involve sensitive AWS data should go to {email} instead of a public issue.
submitpreview.title: Review before submitting
submitpreview.subtitle: CloudSaw will submit exactly the content below. Edit your notes by going back, or pick the browser fallback to submit from your browser instead.
submitpreview.submit_api: 通过 GitHub API 提交
submitpreview.success.title: Issue filed
ai.section_subtitle: Opt-in. CloudSaw never makes an AI call unless you connect your own provider API key here. With no key connected the feature is dormant and no network call is attempted. Suggestions are processed by your chosen provider under their terms, using your own account — CloudSaw cannot control how the provider handles your data.
ai.dormant.title: AI suggestion layer is dormant
ai.dormant.body: Pick a provider and paste a key below to enable the per-finding "AI suggestion" button. The feature stays OFF until you do.
ai.provider.label: 提供方
ai.key.label: 提供方 API 密钥
ai.key.hint: Stored ONLY in your OS keychain at cloudsaw.llm_api_key. Never in SQLite, config files, logs, or URLs. Cleared by the Panic action.
ai.key.not_connected: No key connected — AI suggestion button is disabled.
ai.providers.title: Connected providers
ai.providers.subtitle: One row per provider key you've connected. Each key is stored ONLY in your OS keychain. Switch the active provider any time — only the active one drives AI suggestions.
ai.providers.delete_confirm: Remove "{nickname}" and wipe its key from the OS keychain? This can't be undone.
ai.providers.empty: No providers connected yet. Add one to enable the per-finding AI suggestion button.
ai.providers.nickname_hint: A short label so you can tell your provider keys apart. Up to 60 characters.
ai.providers.new_key_placeholder: Leave blank to keep the existing key
ai.providers.new_key_hint: Paste a new key to rotate. Leaving this blank keeps the existing key in the keychain.
ai.providers.error.no_key: Please paste your provider API key.
ai.disclosure.title: Before you connect a key
ai.disclosure.body: When you enable this feature, the per-finding "AI suggestion" button sends a request to your chosen provider's API using your own account. CloudSaw shows you the EXACT text of every request before any call is made. Requests are built by construction from the finding TYPE, severity, and resource CATEGORY plus the structured business context you set below — never from raw ARNs, bucket names, account IDs, or any name you typed somewhere. Where a placeholder is unavoidable (e.g. [REDACTED-BUCKET-NAME]) it stays a placeholder; CloudSaw does NOT swap a real value back in. AI suggestions are clearly labeled "AI 生成,未审核" — they are NOT a replacement for the human-reviewed knowledge-base article.
ai.context.title: Business context
ai.context.subtitle: Sent to your provider on every AI request so suggestions match your environment. Use only generic, non-identifying values; the request preview shows you exactly what would be sent.
ai.context.industry_warn: Any value here is sent to your AI provider on every request. Avoid customer names or unique identifiers.
ai.context.job_role_placeholder: e.g. "Solo SRE for a mid-size SaaS — I use CloudSaw to spot misconfigurations before quarterly compliance reviews"
ai.context.job_role_hint: Describe your primary job role and what you mainly use ScoutSuite/CloudSaw for. Up to 500 characters.
ai.context.compliance_warn: One of these values contains digits and doesn't match a known framework — it might be a specific identifier. It will be sent to your AI provider as-is.
ai.suggestion.disabled_hint: Connect a provider key in 设置 → AI to enable.
ai.suggestion.label: AI 生成,未审核
ai.suggestion.disclaimer: This text was generated by your AI provider on the request below. It has not been reviewed by humans. Treat it as a starting point — verify every command against the AWS docs and your own environment before running it.
ai.suggestion.placeholders_note: Any [REDACTED-…] placeholder in the answer stays a placeholder. CloudSaw does NOT swap a real value back in.
ai.suggestion.empty: The provider returned no suggestion text.
ai.preview.title: Review the AI request before sending
ai.preview.subtitle: CloudSaw will transmit EXACTLY the text below to your chosen provider. Nothing else. There is no last-mile rewriting and no real-value substitution map.
ai.preview.flag_industry: 行业 is non-empty and will be sent verbatim.
ai.preview.flag_compliance: One or more compliance entries look identifying and will be sent verbatim.
ai.preview.placeholders_label: Placeholders the user message uses (kept as-is)
ai.error.no_provider_key: No AI provider key is connected. 打开 设置 → AI to paste your own key.
ai.error.no_provider: Pick a provider in 设置 → AI before requesting a suggestion.
ai.error.key_invalid: Your provider rejected the API key. 打开 设置 → AI and replace it.
ai.error.rate_limited: Your AI provider is rate-limiting requests right now. Wait a minute and retry.
ai.error.network: Couldn't reach your AI provider. Check your network and try again.
ai.error.server: Your AI provider returned an unexpected error. Try again later.
onboarding.title: 欢迎使用 CloudSaw
onboarding.subtitle: Six quick steps. CloudSaw is fully local — nothing leaves your machine unless you opt in.
onboarding.cli_label: Run these commands in your terminal:
onboarding.cli_warning: CloudSaw shows you the commands. CloudSaw does NOT run them on your behalf.
onboarding.step.language.title: 选择语言
onboarding.step.language.body: CloudSaw ships with English, Spanish, French, and Chinese. Your pick is saved locally and applied immediately. You can change it later from 设置.
onboarding.step.language.label: 界面语言
onboarding.step.password.title: 设置主密码
onboarding.step.password.body: The master password locks the app window. It is NOT an encryption key for your data on disk — use full-disk encryption (FileVault, BitLocker, LUKS) to protect against device theft. You can change or recover it later from 设置.
onboarding.step.password.already_set: Password already set. Click 继续 to move to the next step.
onboarding.step.account.title: 连接你的第一个 AWS 账户
onboarding.step.account.body: Pick an AWS profile from ~/.aws/config. CloudSaw verifies the profile via sts:GetCallerIdentity before saving — and never reads ~/.aws/credentials directly.
onboarding.step.account.no_cli_body: CloudSaw didn't find an AWS profile. Install the AWS CLI and run `aws configure` (or `aws configure sso`) to create one, then return here.
onboarding.step.account.no_cli_windows: Windows install: download the MSI from https://aws.amazon.com/cli/.
onboarding.step.account.no_cli_macos: macOS install: `brew install awscli` or download the official package.
onboarding.step.account.no_cli_linux: Linux install: `pip3 install --user awscli` or your distro's package manager.
onboarding.step.terraform.title: 配置扫描角色
onboarding.step.terraform.body: CloudSaw uses two AWS identities: your personal profile (used just once, here, to set up the scanner role) and a dedicated read-only CloudSawScannerRole that runs every scan. Your personal credentials are never used to scan.
onboarding.step.terraform.no_account_hin: You don't have an active account yet. Go back to the account step.
onboarding.step.terraform.profile_missin: The profile linked to your account is no longer in ~/.aws/config. Go back to the account step to fix it.
onboarding.step.terraform.completed: Scanner role provisioned. Click 继续.
onboarding.step.terraform.two_credential: Used once, briefly, to create the scanner role. Needs IAM-admin permissions on this account (the specific actions are listed below). CloudSaw does not store these credentials and never reuses them to scan.

A dedicated, least-privilege role scoped to SecurityAudit (read-only). Every scan assumes this role using short-lived STS credentials (≤ 1 hour). It is provisioned once and reused for scheduled and multi-account scans — no further credential prompts.
Scans run under a minimal read-only identity, not your high-privilege profile.
The scanner role is a distinct, auditable identity in CloudTrail, separate from your day-to-day activity.
Set up once, reused for every future and multi-account scan — no further credential prompts.
onboarding.step.terraform.permissions.bo: Before you click Create IAM Role, confirm the AWS profile you chose can create an IAM role and attach a policy on this account. Administrator access (e.g. the AWS-managed AdministratorAccess policy) satisfies this. At minimum the profile must be allowed the following actions:
onboarding.step.terraform.permissions.no: These elevated permissions are required only for this one-time setup. Scans themselves run under CloudSawScannerRole, not your profile.
onboarding.step.terraform.terraform_unav: Terraform isn't available in this build, so Create IAM Role is disabled. Use the manual CLI option below, or reinstall CloudSaw from a trusted source.
onboarding.step.terraform.permission_fai: Provisioning failed. The most common cause is that the AWS profile you chose lacks the IAM permissions listed above. Confirm the profile has admin-equivalent IAM permissions on this account and try again — or use the manual CLI option below.
onboarding.step.context.title: (Optional) Add business context for the AI layer
onboarding.step.context.body: If you plan to use the AI suggestion layer, these structured fields tailor suggestions to your environment. They are stored locally and only ever sent to your chosen AI provider if you connect a key — never otherwise. You can skip this step and configure it later in Settings.
onboarding.step.scan.title: 运行第一次扫描
onboarding.step.scan.body: 确认 everything works end-to-end by running a scan against the account you just configured. Scans land locally — nothing is transmitted to CloudSaw.
onboarding.step.scan.completed_hint: Scan complete. 完成 to open the main app.
onboarding.step.scan.ready_hint: Click Scan now to run your first scan. CloudSaw will open the Findings page automatically once it completes.
onboarding.step.scan.role_missing_hint: Connect a scanner role on the previous step before running a scan.
onboarding.done.title: 已设置完成
onboarding.done.body: Onboarding complete. From here you can run more scans, add more accounts, configure schedules, and explore findings.
settings.section.onboarding_subtitle: Re-run the wizard to add another AWS account or revisit business-context setup.
settings.section.onboarding_add_account: 添加另一个 AWS 账户
report.export.title: Export scan report
report.export.body: CloudSaw generates a self-contained HTML report (zero external resources) or a PDF. Both include a sensitive-data review banner, the generation timestamp, and the CloudSaw version. Account IDs are masked by default; check the box below to include the full 12-digit IDs.
report.export.disclosure_hint: Default is masked (****dddd). Tick to include the full 12-digit IDs in the report. Reports are easier to review for sensitive data with masking on.
report.export.path_placeholder: Use "选择位置…" to pick a path
report.export.auto_ok: 自动导出 copy saved to {path}.
report.export.auto_failed: 自动导出 copy failed — the in-app save still succeeded.
report.export.error.output_write: Couldn't write the report. The chosen folder may be read-only.
report.export.error.pdf_render: Couldn't render the PDF. Try the HTML format instead.
report.custom.title: 自定义报告
report.custom.body: Build a date-range report across one or more accounts. Findings, per-service totals, and event-log activity in the range are aggregated. Use this as a high-level overview for stakeholders.
report.custom.account_scope: Account scope (one per line; leave blank for all)
report.custom.empty_scope_hint: Leave the scope empty to include every locally-known account.
report.custom.section_subtitle: Generate a date-range report across one or more accounts, with optional per-account service scoping. Findings, per-service totals, and event-log activity in the range are aggregated.
report.custom.scope_empty: No accounts in scope yet — click "Add" to include one. Leave the scope empty to include every locally-known account.
report.settings.title: 自动导出
report.settings.subtitle: Optional. When enabled, every generated report is also copied to the configured folder (OneDrive recommended on Windows). The in-app save always succeeds even if the auto-export copy fails.
report.settings.mask_default: Mask account IDs in reports by default
scanner_role.requirements.title: Role requirements
scanner_role.requirements.body: Create an IAM role in this AWS account with the following trust policy + managed policy. Use the recipe below that matches your environment — Console clicks, Terraform, CloudFormation, or AWS CLI. The external ID must match exactly.
scanner_role.recipes.title: How to create this role
scanner_role.recipes.body: Pick whichever path matches your environment. All four create the same role; the values are pre-filled with your trust principal and external ID.
scanner_role.recipes.console.title: AWS Console (click-by-click)
scanner_role.recipes.console.step1: Open the IAM console → Roles → Create role.
scanner_role.recipes.console.step2: Choose "Custom trust policy" and paste the JSON below.
scanner_role.recipes.console.step3: On the permissions step, search for "SecurityAudit" (or ReadOnlyAccess) and attach it.
scanner_role.recipes.console.step4: Name the role anything you like (e.g. CloudSawScannerRole) and create it.
scanner_role.recipes.console.step5: Copy the role's ARN from its summary page and paste it into the form below.
scanner_role.recipes.terraform.title: Terraform module
scanner_role.recipes.terraform.body: CloudSaw ships a reusable Terraform module — drop this block into your existing IaC repo and run terraform apply.
scanner_role.recipes.cloudformation.body: Save the template below to scanner-role.yaml and deploy with `aws cloudformation deploy --template-file scanner-role.yaml --stack-name cloudsaw-scanner-role --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM`.
scanner_role.recipes.cli.title: AWS CLI
scanner_role.recipes.cli.body: Two commands. Run them against the AWS profile that has permission to create IAM roles in this account.
scanner_role.form.title: Validate & connect
scanner_role.success.title: Scanner role connected
scanner_role.success.body: CloudSaw can now scan account {accountId} via {roleArn}. Every scan assumes this role using short-lived STS credentials.
scanner_role.error.assume_denied: AWS refused the assume-role call. The most common cause is that the role's trust policy doesn't include the external ID condition shown above, or its principal doesn't match your AWS profile's caller ARN.
scanner_role.error.not_found: AWS reports that role doesn't exist. Double-check the ARN — you may have a typo, or the role wasn't actually created.
scanner_role.error.assume_failed: Couldn't reach AWS to validate the role. Check your network and any SSO session, then try again.
scanner_role.error.account_mismatch: That role belongs to a different AWS account than CloudSaw has on record for this account.
scanner_role.error.caller_account_mismat: Your AWS profile resolves to a different account than CloudSaw has on record. Re-add this account, or check ~/.aws/config.
scanner_role.error.invalid_arn: That doesn't look like an IAM role ARN. Expected format: arn:aws:iam::<12-digit-account>:role/<role-name>.
settings.section.updates_subtitle: Choose whether CloudSaw checks for new releases on launch and how it tells you about them.
settings.updates.auto_toggle_description: On launch, CloudSaw asks the release server whether a newer version exists. If you turn this off, the update banner stays hidden until you use the button below.
settings.updates.available_body: Version {version} is available. Review the release notes before you install.
settings.updates.check_failed_body: The release server didn't answer. Confirm this device is online and try again.
